NewCard.title: NewCard
NewCard.description: A Pokémon card inventory item for the shop.

name.description: The name and set of the card.

price.description: The price of the card in GBP.

imageUrl.description: Data URI or URL of the card image.

sold.description: Whether the card has been sold.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the card was added.

/new-cards/{cardId}.description: Public collection of cards for sale at the stall.
